architecture:
ProbGRU_NB(
  (input_proj): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=13, out_features=208, bias=True)
    (1): GELU(approximate='none')
    (2): LayerNorm((208,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
  )
  (gru): GRU(208, 208, num_layers=2, batch_first=True, dropout=0.292829137003348)
  (norm): LayerNorm((208,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
  (mu_decoder): HorizonConditionedHead(
    (attn): MultiheadAttention(
      (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=208, out_features=208, bias=True)
    )
    (norm): LayerNorm((208,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    (res): ResidualForecastHead(
      (block): Sequential(
        (0): Linear(in_features=208, out_features=208, bias=True)
        (1): GELU(approximate='none')
        (2): Dropout(p=0.292829137003348, inplace=False)
        (3): Linear(in_features=208, out_features=208, bias=True)
      )
      (norm): LayerNorm((208,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    )
    (out): Linear(in_features=208, out_features=1, bias=True)
  )
  (alpha_decoder): HorizonConditionedHead(
    (attn): MultiheadAttention(
      (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=208, out_features=208, bias=True)
    )
    (norm): LayerNorm((208,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    (res): ResidualForecastHead(
      (block): Sequential(
        (0): Linear(in_features=208, out_features=208, bias=True)
        (1): GELU(approximate='none')
        (2): Dropout(p=0.292829137003348, inplace=False)
        (3): Linear(in_features=208, out_features=208, bias=True)
      )
      (norm): LayerNorm((208,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    )
    (out): Linear(in_features=208, out_features=1, bias=True)
  )
  (softplus): Softplus(beta=1.0, threshold=20.0)
)
